home.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
home.faq.a1: json is a professional online tool platform providing 50+ tools for developers, designers, content creators, and privacy-conscious users. Tool categories include developer tools (JSON, encoding/decoding, hash calculation), privacy tools (SMS receiver, temp email, password generator), image tools (compress, crop, remove background), PDF tools (merge, split, compress), and AI tools (humanize, content detection, competitive analysis). Most basic tools require no registration. Premium AI features require an account.
home.faq.a2: All 50+ basic tools on json are completely free to use, including JSON tools, image processing, PDF tools, password generator, and more — no hidden fees or usage limits. Premium AI features (such as humanization, content detection, competitive analysis) require registration and are billed by Token — flexible pricing, pay-as-you-go.
home.faq.q3: Is my data safe? Does json store my files?
home.faq.a3: Most tools process data entirely in your browser. We never view, store, or transmit your files and data to any server. For example, image compression, background removal, and format conversion all happen client-side. Premium AI features require registration, and we store your usage history and Token consumption, but not your original data content.
home.faq.q4: Do I need to create an account to use the tools?
home.faq.a4: Basic tools require no registration and are available instantly, including JSON tools, image processing, PDF tools, password generator, temp email, SMS receiver, and more. Premium AI features (humanization, content detection, competitive analysis) require registration to manage Tokens and usage history.
home.faq.q5: What types of tools does json offer?
home.faq.a5: We offer these major categories: Privacy tools (SMS receiver, temp email, password generator, virtual identity generator, browser fingerprint detector), Developer tools (JSON toolbox, hash calculator, Base64 encoder/decoder, URL encoder/decoder, regex tester, timestamp converter), Image tools (compress, crop, format conversion, remove background, add watermark, rotate, OCR, to video, to PDF), PDF tools (merge, split, compress, encrypt, watermark, to image, extract text, reorder pages), AI tools (humanization, content detection, competitive analysis).
home.faq.a6: The json platform supports Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Spanish. You can switch languages using the language selector in the top-right corner of the page. Some tools (such as OCR and AI tools) also support multi-language content processing.
home.faq.q7: Can I use tools on my phone?
home.faq.a7: Yes! All json tools are responsive and perfectly adapted for phones, tablets, desktops, and other devices. No need to download any app — just open in your browser and start using.
home.faq.q8: Can tools process files in batches?
home.faq.a8: Yes, many tools support batch processing. For example, image compression, background removal, format conversion, and cropping tools can process up to 30 images at once. JSON tools and encoding tools also support batch mode. After processing, you can download as a zip package.
home.faq.a9: AI tools use a Token billing model. After registering an account, you can purchase Token packages. Using tools consumes corresponding Tokens. Different tools consume different amounts — check the tool page for details. You can top up Tokens anytime after consumption.
home.faq.q10: How can I contact you if I encounter issues or have suggestions?
home.faq.a10: If you encounter any issues or have any suggestions, please contact us through our contact page. We will respond to your message within 24 hours. You can also find our social media accounts at the bottom of the page.

home.seo.title: Your All-in-One Online Tool Platform
home.seo.intro: is a comprehensive collection of free online tools designed for developers, designers, and privacy-conscious users. All tools run directly in your browser, ensuring your data never leaves your device. Whether you need to generate secure passwords, process images, format JSON, or protect your privacy, we have the tools you need.
home.seo.privacy_desc: Our privacy tools help you protect your personal information and maintain anonymity online:
home.seo.sms_detail: Receive verification SMS without using your real phone number. Perfect for signing up for websites and services while keeping your personal number private.
home.seo.email_detail: Generate disposable email addresses that automatically expire after 10 minutes. Ideal for one-time registrations and avoiding spam.
home.seo.password_detail: Create cryptographically secure random passwords with customizable length, character sets, and complexity options.
home.seo.address_detail: Generate random virtual identity information including name, address, phone number, and email for testing, form filling, or protecting your real identity.
home.seo.dev_desc: Essential utilities for web developers, software engineers, and IT professionals:
home.seo.json_detail: A complete JSON toolkit with 40+ tools including formatting, validation, conversion, minification, diff comparison, and JSONPath queries.
home.seo.hash_detail: Calculate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, and HMAC hashes for text and files. All processing happens client-side for maximum security.
home.seo.base64_detail: Encode and decode Base64 strings with support for text, files up to 50MB, Base64URL format, and MIME line splitting.
home.seo.regex_detail: Test and debug regular expressions with real-time matching, syntax highlighting, and explanation of match groups.
home.seo.media_desc: Process images without uploading to any server — everything runs in your browser:
home.seo.compress_detail: Compress JPG, PNG, and WebP images while maintaining quality. Batch process up to 30 images at once.
home.seo.removebg_detail: Remove image backgrounds using AI technology that runs entirely in your browser. Perfect for product photos, portraits, and logos.
home.seo.qr_detail: Generate QR codes for URLs, WiFi credentials, vCards, and more. Customize colors, size, and error correction level.
home.seo.why_intro: We built json with a focus on privacy, speed, and accessibility:
home.seo.why_privacy_desc: Most tools process data entirely in your browser. We never see, store, or transmit your files or data to any server.
home.seo.why_nosignup_desc: All tools are available instantly without creating an account. No email verification, no passwords to remember.
home.seo.why_browser_desc: No software to download or install. Works on any device with a modern browser — desktop, tablet, or mobile.
home.seo.why_free_desc: All 50+ tools are free to use with no hidden fees, premium tiers, or usage limits. Supported by minimal, non-intrusive ads.
home.seo.conclusion: Whether you're a developer needing quick access to encoding tools, a designer working with images, or someone who values online privacy, json provides the tools you need — fast, free, and private. Bookmark this page and access your favorite tools anytime, anywhere.
